zh.lifeSummary: 當Phebe Leete於1585年12月20日出生在英國坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達時，她的父親Robert Leete60歲，母親Alice Grundy41歲。她於1610年3月29日與George Parkhurst Sr在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1642年之前在英國素福爾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phebe Leete于1585年12月20日出生在英国坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達时，她的父亲Robert Leete60岁，母亲Alice Grundy41岁。她于1610年3月29日与George Parkhurst Sr在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1642年之前在英国素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Leete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: An early American bearer of this name was one of the founders ofGuilford, CT. William Leete (c. 1613–83), a colonial governorof New Haven colony and CT, was born at Dodington, Huntingtonshire,England. He converted to Puritanism and sailed for America to escapepersecution in May 1639.

variants.name: Leet
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a watercourse orroad junction, Old English gelǣt, or a habitational namefrom Leat in Devon, or The Leete in Essex, named with this element.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Phebe Leete was born on 20 December 1585, in Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Robert Leete, was 60 and her mother, Alice Grundy, was 41. She married George Parkhurst Sr on 29 March 1610, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died before 1642, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phebe Leete est née le 20 décembre 1585, à Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Leete, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Alice Grundy, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé George Parkhurst Sr le 29 mars 1610, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1642, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phebe Leete am 20. Dezember 1585 in Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Leete 60 und ihre Mutter Alice Grundy 41. Sie hat am 29. März 1610 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom George Parkhurst Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1642 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phebe Leete è nata il il 20 dicembre 1585 nel Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, Robert Leete, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Alice Grundy, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato George Parkhurst Sr il 29 marzo 1610, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 1642, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Phebe Leeteが1585年12月20日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアリットル エバースデンで生まれた時，父Robert Leeteは60歳，母Alice Grundyは41歳であった。1610年3月29日にイギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチでGeorge Parkhurst Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1642年以前にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで死去した。

ko.Ipswich St Margaret, Suffolk, England: 영국 수폴크 이프스위치 이프스위치 스트 마거릿

ko.Ipswich St Margaret, Ipswich, Suffolk, E: 영국 수폴크 이프스위치 이프스위치 스트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Phebe Leete(이)가 1585년 12월 20일 영국 캄브리지실르 리틀 에버즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Leete(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Grundy(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1610년 3월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 George Parkhurst Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1642년 이전 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phebe Leete nasceu em 20 de dezembro de 1585, em Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Leete, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Alice Grundy, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com George Parkhurst Sr em 29 de março de 1610, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1642, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phebe Leete родилась 20 декабря 1585 г. в местности литл эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Leete было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Grundy, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Parkhurst Sr 29 марта 1610 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 1642 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phebe Leete nació el 20 de diciembre de 1585, en Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Leete, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Alice Grundy, tenía 41 años. Se casó con George Parkhurst Sr el 29 de marzo de 1610, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 1642, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
